questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '27c56bbc-6822-4a0a-bbf4-a56d4a5add4d' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '8ede5f35-f5f4-4879-b0d4-0960c067625e'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '27c56bbc-6822-4a0a-bbf4-a56d4a5add4d'; delete from question_items where id = '27c56bbc-6822-4a0a-bbf4-a56d4a5add4d';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
